calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-22-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For A Sanction For Destruction Of Evidence
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark R. Meyer, Esq. of Losch & Ehrlich, Tel. 415.956.8400, for defendant and moving party;
Lisa Battista, Esq. of Pacific American Law Group, Tel. 415.795.3579, for plaintiff and opposing party.

The parties did not stipulate to the Pro Tem Judge. The matter was argued. After hearing, DEFENDANT SHERRI KING's Motion For A Sanction For Destruction Of Evidence is not re-set in Department 302 due to the proximity of the trial date. The Pro Tem Judge shall prepare a Report and Recommendation to the trial department. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst Halperin; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR # 4609, Tel. 415.272.1753.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2013 Off Calendar

Mtn To Compel Production Of Docs
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: the Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SHERRI KING's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents WILL be heard at 9 am on the Discovery calendar. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Defendant Sherri King'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Nov-18-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lisa Battista, Esq. of Pacific Amaerican Law Group, Tel. 415.795.3579, for plaintiff and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT SHERRI KING'S Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is denied. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Thomas A. Paoli; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
